description: Null securityContext overrides in ArgoCD redis-ha values.yaml cause drift under Helm 3.17.1 strict validation

drift_points.expected: Remove null override to let upstream redis-ha chart defaults apply
drift_points.actual: securityContext: null (explicit null override of upstream defaults)
override_chain: upstream redis-ha chart: securityContext has default non-null values
Helm 3.17.1: stricter validation rejects null securityContext, producing different rendered output
drift_points.impact: CI failure due to manifest diff between rendered output and checked-in upstream.yaml

helm_version_notes: Helm 3.17.1 tightened validation of null values in YAML. Previously, securityContext: null was silently treated as 'omit this field'. In 3.17.1, it produces different rendered output (explicit null vs omitted field), causing a diff in the generated manifests.
